channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lyft Acquires Gett UK to Expand into London's Black Cab Market
item.description: The ride-hailing company has agreed to purchase Gett UK, positioning itself as the leading app for London's black cab drivers, according to Lyft's head of global growth.

item.title: Andy Jassy's chicken wing club for networking in Seattle
item.description: Before joining Amazon's C-suite, Jassy hosted weekly chicken wing nights to network with peers.

item.title: Meta CTO says stress five times a year is 'useful signal'
item.description: Bosworth says busy schedules trigger stress, but he calms down with exercise.

item.title: Discord group's Mythos access shows AI hacking danger
item.description: Unauthorized access to Anthropic's Mythos model signals deeper risks.

item.title: Gen Alpha relies on ChatGPT for emails; call for Digital Harm Tax
item.description: I nearly lost my own life to social media. Phone bans and lawsuits aren't enough.
